content.text: yes — the one confirmed allergy on file for Mira is **egg**, which has been confirmed by your pediatric office (Riverdale Pediatrics) and presents as mild hives. that's the key thing to share with any new caregiver, and it's worth flagging that egg hides in a lot of common toddler foods — baked goods, pasta, some crackers — so it helps to give them a habit of checking ingredient labels, not just avoiding obvious things like scrambled eggs. if you'd like a short written note they can keep handy (ingredients to watch for, what a reaction looks like, when to call you vs. seek help), that's a good next step to put together before their first day.
